nodes.name: 安第斯神鹫
nodes.summary: 安第斯神鹫（Andean condor，学名 Vultur gryphus），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于安地斯山脈、南美洲、圣玛尔塔内华达山脉，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁、稀树草原、开阔山地，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。
nodes.shortSummary: 安第斯神鷲（學名：Vultur gryphus；英語：Andean condor）又称康多兀鷲、安地斯禿鷹、南美神鷹、安地斯神鷹，是安第斯鹫属（Vultur）的唯一一种，屬於南美洲的一種新大陸鷲。牠們分佈在安地斯山脈及南美洲西部鄰近的太平洋海岸，是西半球最大的飛行鳥類。 安地斯…

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It prefers relatively open, non-forested areas which allow it to spot carrion from the air, such as the páramo or rocky, mountainous areas in general. It occasionally ranges to lowlands in eastern Bolivia, northern Peru, and southwestern Brazil, descends to lowland desert areas in Chile and Peru, and is found over southern-beech forests in Patagonia. In southern Patagonia, meadows are important for Andean condors as this habitat is likely to have herbivores present

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and by secondary poisoning from lead in carcasses killed by hunters
